model.semantics: A legal toppling subtracts four grains at a site and adds one grain to each orthogonal neighbor.

status.composability_limit: The complete amplitude table shows that this witness is not parity-linear for arbitrary 0..3 input amplitudes; a parity-linear or resetting input interface remains open.
status.decisive_claim: For Boolean one-grain additions at the two inputs, the south/east output odometer parities reproduce the north/west bits, and both output corridors can be extended arbitrarily.

title: Integrated parity crossover with scalable output wires
